content.desc: Forging the frontier of quantum algorithms, NISQ hardware, and machine learning. Three arXiv co-authorships. Outperformed QAOA on Weighted Max-Cut.
content.footer: © MMXXVI · Danush Vikraman · PES University · Bengaluru
content.p1-s: Co-authored with Prof. Gajanan V Honnavar
content.p1-d: Four-layer pipelined architecture unifying SA warm-start, QWalk-MCMC exploration, and adaptive Grover amplification. Outperformed QAOA by 15.3–21.4 pp on Weighted Max-Cut. Validated on IBM ibm_fez 156-qubit NISQ at depth 119.
content.p2-s: Co-authored with Prof. Gajanan V Honnavar
content.p2-d: Three-layer MCMC + greedy + adaptive SA framework. Ranked 2nd on Rosenbrock 5D with fastest runtime (0.061s). Delivered 1.8% shorter TSP tours at N=200. Open-source on GitHub.
content.p3-s: Co-authored with Prof. Gajanan V Honnavar
content.p3-d: 3-qubit quantum circuit exploiting NISQ decoherence as controlled entropy. Achieved 9.38-bit Shannon entropy (≈91% of max) on IBM ibm_fez. Validated on Qiskit Aer.
content.p4-d: Implemented and stress-tested BB84 QKD circuits, verifying protocol integrity under simulated channel noise on IBM Quantum Experience.
content.p5-d: PT-broken non-Hermitian system · RF Green Ambulance Corridor (Arduino) · RSA Encryption (Python) · 8-bit Vedic Multiplier (SystemVerilog)
